verses.1: A revelation is within my heart about the disobedience of the wicked:
verses.2: For he flatters himself in his own eyes,
verses.3: The words of his mouth are iniquity and deceit.
verses.4: He plots iniquity on his bed.
verses.5: Your loving kindness, LORD, is in the heavens.
verses.6: Your righteousness is like the mountains of God.
verses.7: How precious is your loving kindness, God!
verses.8: They shall be abundantly satisfied with the abundance of your house.
verses.9: For with you is the spring of life.
verses.10: Oh continue your loving kindness to those who know you,
verses.11: Don’t let the foot of pride come against me.
verses.12: There the workers of iniquity are fallen.
